## Alternatives Considered

| Option          | Pros                    | Cons                      |
|-----------------|-------------------------|---------------------------|
| Option A        | Simple, well-known      | Limited scalability       |
| Option B        | High throughput         | Complex ops               |
| Option C        | Fully managed, cheap    | Vendor lock-in risk       |
| **Chosen**      | Best balance            | Acceptable trade-offs     |
